_note: Key conventions: Java interfaces with @FunctionalInterface (Handler, ExceptionHandler, RequestLogger) for Java interop; Kotlin fun interfaces (TaskInitializer, TaskHandler, EndpointExecutor) for internal code; mixed Kotlin/Java codebase with Java used for public API interfaces and Kotlin for implementations; Plugin abstraction with priority/lifecycle; config split between JavalinConfig (public) and JavalinState (internal); router uses PathMatcher with regex-based PathParser; Endpoint metadata pattern via EndpointMetadata marker interface.
